latestPosts.caption:
It’s time to answer our Weekly Tokimeki Question!✨️ What color sparks joy for you?

For Marie, it’s white. “Wearing white calms me and refreshes me, and it feels like it’s easier for me to hear my own voice at the moment.”

This week’s question may feel simple, but it’s an entryway to start noticing the things around you more! 🎨

① Take a moment to ask yourself: What color sparks joy for you? What is the first color that comes to mind?
② As you enjoy your day, keep that color in mind, so you can find moments of joy you may have never noticed before! You can even wear clothes that are that color to experience and notice how it makes you feel!
③ Share the color or colors that give you the feeling of tokimeki in the comments below in either the form of a photo or comment! We’ll showcase your photos and comments in a feature post!👇️❤️

#artoftokimeki #tokimeki #prompt #journalprompt #personaldevelopment

#konmariconsultant #professionalorganizer #professionalorganization #businesscertification #careerchange

When we think about tokimeki, there are 3 main circles that you should try to keep in balance to make joy more sustainable in your life. They are：

1. Your Joy Circle: Understanding Your Joy
Finding joy for yourself is essential. It is what drives you forward. When you are fulfilled and happy, your capacity to contribute increases, and when self-care becomes possible, it becomes easier to thrive and share.

2. Your Social Circle: To Share & Amplify
Joy multiplies when shared. Understanding what sparks joy for those you care about creates stronger bonds and mutual support. When you have social joy, even personal achievements can feel more exciting.

3. Your Value Circle: What You Bring Beyond Yourself. What You Bring to the World
Through work, art, service, or innovation, contribute to the world. With external value, the practice can become much more sustainable as a lifestyle.

Your personal joy circle, your social circle, and your value circle.
All three together to create a more joyful life for you, your people, and the world.

✨Follow us as we share practices, rituals, prompts, etc. to learn how!

#tokimeki #artoftokimeki #ritual #joy #community

Have you ever heard of the Japanese word “Tokimeki”? It means the inner spark that tells you what truly matters to you and also is the word for “spark of joy”! ✨

What Japanese words have you learned about that you find intriguing or important to your life? Let us know in the comments below!👇

📍 Join us to explore your own unique tokimeki with us @artoftokimeki!
We’d love to be a part of your journey!

#artoftokimeki #tokimeki #sparkjoy #mariekondo

From meetups to special retreats, it always makes me so happy to see members of the KonMari Consultant community in person! Everywhere I go, I hear that our community has been such a joyful group, and it truly  makes my heart so full knowing how warm and welcoming our community is! 

I couldn’t have spread the life-changing magic of tidying up with the world without KonMari Consultants, and I am so, so proud of the work they do to guide clients through their tidying journeys in a joyful way!❤

Each KonMari Consultant runs their own professional organization business and they are each so unique! I love hearing what kind of clients they work with and hearing their success stories! I also love how at these events, KonMari Consultants also share their tips to their businesses with each other and cheer each other on! It truly is a special group and I am so proud and grateful to have such a beautiful community✨

📌Comment: INFO to learn more about what KonMari Consultants do, how to become one, and our upcoming courses❤

We’d love to welcome you!

📅Upcoming Course:
October In-Person Course in London
October  16th-18th | ExCeL London

#konmari #professionalorganizer #professionalorganization #homeorganization #smallbusiness

I thought this would be a great article to share with all of you,  as many of us have kids that are out of school and home more!✨ I am sure that with the little ones running around and enjoying their summer break, sometimes the home needs a joy-sparking reset! You can most definitely involve your children in tidying up in joyful ways!♡

My tip as a parent is to set a joyful example for your children and showing them how important and fun it is to take care of what you own and tidy up your home, so they also want to take part in it!

📌Comment: “KIDS” and I will send you the full article “Marie‘s Tips for Tidying With Children” to your DMs!

#organization #organizationinspo #children #family #sparkjoy

KonMari and Tokimeki ask different questions that both deepen your understanding of self and joy. Tokimeki however, goes even further, where you expand your KonMari understanding and find ways to apply it to everything in your life, in a way where you can hone your sensitivity and skill!

👉Comment “JOIN” to become one of the first members of our community! Start honing your sensitivity to joy and the art of tokimeki with us.

#artoftokimeki #tokimeki #reflect #hone #sparkjoy

Welcome to our Weekly Tokimeki Question✨

Our practice begins with this simple question: 📌What is one thing in your life that sparks joy right now?

The art of slowing down, reflecting, and realizing the things to be grateful for, no matter how small they may seem, is a beautiful way to center yourself in a busy world.

🍵For me, it’s tea.From thinking about where the leaves were grown to choosing the right teaware for the moment, each small decision sparks joy, one after another.

Take a moment to breathe in and out and ask yourself this question:
📌 What is one thing in your life that sparks joy right now?

Write your answer down on a piece of paper, take a photo of it, and comment below with your photo for a chance to be featured in @artoftokimeki and or @mariekondo’s upcoming posts!

Let’s spread tokimeki together✨

#artoftokimeki #tokimeki #journalprompt #reflection #journaling

@mariekondo taught you how to tidy.
She taught you to notice what sparks joy✨

This is what comes next…
Tokimeki.

Not just asking yourself what sparks joy, but honing your understanding of your inner spark that tells you what truly matters.

Join us in exploring the idea of tokimeki on a new level to spark more joy in every aspect of your life

We’ll guide you every step of the way!

We hope you stay.

#Tokimeki #ArtofTokimeki #SparkJoy #Japan

Feeling the soft breeze and breathing in fresh air sparks so much joy✨ I love spending time on the balcony and clearing my mind!

Do you also enjoy slow moments during trips? Leave a ❤️ below if you’re like me, and love taking moments to slow down even on vacations!

#konmari #vacation #trip #slowlife #wellness

Tea has been something I am getting more and more into this year, and it is sparking so much joy visiting different tea shops, adding new teas to part of my self-care rituals, and learning more about it!🍵✨ There are so many lovely tea shops and cafes all over Japan, and I hear that matcha is becoming very popular all over the world! Have you ever made your own matcha or tried Japanese teas? I’d love to know your favorites!

📌Comment “TEA” and I’ll send you our article: “The Art of Tea”🍵as well!

#tea #konmari #selfcare #sparkjoy #article

There are so many emotional benefits to having a tidy home and space, and I truly hope that you are all able to experience the life-changing magic of it!✨

📌Comment: YES! And I’ll send you the helpful links and free downloads/articles to guide you through your tidying journey!
